en: Hey Jessica, how's your beaver? Good!
Great! How's your beaver? Busy as ever!
Our characters had pet beavers. Sure.
ko: 우리 캐릭터들은 애완 비버를 키웠어. 맞아.

en: The beaver is the official animal of Canada.
It's our national mascot. It's a noble creature.
Okay girls, everyone knows a beaver's favorite food is wood.
ko: 비버가 가장 좋아하는 음식은 나무라는 건 모두 알아.

en: I just hope we brought along enough of it for our three-day galactic space journey.
ko: 3일간의 우주 여행을 위해 충분히 가져왔기를 바래.

en: So let's do the math. If Robin's beaver devours six inches of wood every half hour,
and Jessica's beaver devours eight inches of wood every 45 minutes,
how much wood will I need to keep both of these beavers well-fed all weekend long?
ko: 주말 내내 이 두 비버를 잘 먹이려면 얼마나 많은 나무가 필요할까?

en: While you figure it out at home, how about we sing you a song about our beavers?
ko: 집에서 계산하는 동안 비버에 관한 노래를 불러줄까?

en: No, you do not get to hear the beaver song.
ko: 아니, 비버 노래는 들을 수 없어. 정말 좋은 노래야.
